hero.text: Believe in the beauty of your dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day for exploration and taking risks. Embrace the unknown.
aries.love: Your passion shines bright, attracting new connections. Open your heart.
aries.career: Opportunities are on the horizon. Trust your instincts and seize the moment.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on nurturing your relationships.
taurus.love: A solid foundation will deepen your bond. Communication is essential.
taurus.career: Take a practical approach to your tasks today; persistence will pay off.

gemini.general: Your curiosity will lead you to exciting discoveries. Stay open-minded.
gemini.love: Flirtation is in the air; enjoy the lighthearted interactions.
gemini.career: Collaborative projects can bring fruitful results. Engage with your team.

cancer.general: Emotions may run high, so practice self-care and compassion.
cancer.love: Nurture the bonds you hold dear today; tenderness will bring peace.
cancer.career: Creative insights will guide your professional path. Trust your intuition.

leo.general: Your confidence is magnetic; use it to inspire those around you.
leo.love: Romance is highlighted. Be bold and express your feelings openly.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise. Step up and shine brightly.

virgo.general: Focus on the details today; your meticulous nature will pay off.
virgo.love: Compatibility shines through today—listen and share honestly.
virgo.career: Organizational skills are needed now. Tidy up your workspace for clarity.

libra.general: Balance is essential today. Seek harmony in all your interactions.
libra.love: Your charm is inviting. Connections will blossom with kindness.
libra.career: Networking may bring unexpected opportunities. Be open to new collaborations.

scorpio.general: Emotions may be intense; channel them into creative outlets.
scorpio.love: Passion ignites in your relationships. Embrace the deep connections.
scorpio.career: Transformation is on the table. Embrace change with open arms.

sagittarius.general: Your adventurous spirit calls for exploration. Adventure awaits.
sagittarius.love: A spark of spontaneity could ignite romance. Be open to surprises.
sagittarius.career: Take risks in your career today; bold moves could yield great rewards.

capricorn.general: A focused approach will lead you to your goals. Stay disciplined.
capricorn.love: Quality time with a partner is beneficial; strengthen your bond.
capricorn.career: Hard work pays off now. Your efforts will be recognized and rewarded.

aquarius.general: Embrace your uniqueness today. Originality will attract attention.
aquarius.love: An unexpected romance could blossom; embrace the spontaneity.
aquarius.career: Innovative ideas can lead to breakthroughs. Share your thoughts with others.

pisces.general: Your intuition is heightened now. Trust your inner voice.
pisces.love: Compassionate love is in the air. Be open and vulnerable with others.
pisces.career: Use your creativity to solve work-related problems. Artistic insights will inspire solutions.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: You don’t have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
professional.author: Zig Ziglar

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
motivation.author: Walt Whitman

captions.text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
captions.author: T.S. Eliot

captions.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
captions.author: Charles R. Swindoll

captions.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
captions.author: Charles Kingsleigh

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused, and surround yourself with good people.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
tech.author: B.F. Skinner

tech.text: The future is already here—it’s just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
tech.author: Nelson Mandela

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Life is too important to be taken seriously.
fun.author: Oscar Wilde

fun.text: Silly is you in a natural state, and serious is something you have to do until you can get silly again.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: The best way to cheer yourself up is to try to cheer somebody else up.
fun.author: Mark Twain

fun.text: In every job that must be done, there is an element of fun.
fun.author: Mary Poppins

fun.text: The more you praise and celebrate your life, the more there is in life to celebrate.
fun.author: Oprah Winfrey

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: For as he thinketh in his heart, so is he.
faith.author: Proverbs 23:7

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy. It makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: All things are possible for those who believe.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha
